LongParameterList:TestFixtures.kt$( id: Long = 0, word: String = "gatos", wordDisplay: String = word, language: String = "pt", difficulty: Int = 2, category: String = "animal", hints: String = """["Dica 1","Dica 2","Dica 3","Dica 4","Dica 5"]""", source: String = "AI", generatedAt: Long = System.currentTimeMillis(), playedAt: Long? = null, isPlayed: Boolean = false, isValid: Boolean = true, )
MaxLineLength:PuzzleGenerator.kt$PuzzleGeneratorImpl$"$base\n\nThe previous response was invalid. Generate a DIFFERENT word with ${wordLength.first}-${wordLength.last} letters."

MaxLineLength:PuzzleGenerator.kt$PuzzleGeneratorImpl$"$base\n\nYour previous response was rejected: $failureReason. The word MUST have ${wordLength.first}-${wordLength.last} letters. Try again with a DIFFERENT word."
